title: export_svg
description: Export the current canvas as an SVG file on disk. Returns the file path and SVG size.

filepath.description: Path to save the SVG file (default "output/scene.svg"). Relative paths resolve from project root.

exclude_layers.description: Layer names to omit from the exported SVG, such as construction guide layers.

exclude_element_ids.description: Element IDs to omit from the exported SVG.

exclude_prefixes.description: Element ID prefixes to omit from the exported SVG.
